title: The Milo Show
description: This is not your standard hamster sitcom. Family life can be funny, especially when you have a clumsy whirlwind like Milo around.
quote: Guess I Milo’ed that up again!
altHero: Milo, a suspenders and glasses wearing dork hamster
alt1: the hamster family in the living room
alt3: Milo waving his arms as he falls into a tiered birthday cake
alt4: Milo smiling with cake all over himself
